summary: Backend-only testing of User Exercises (Custom) CRUD endpoints and calendar no-limit removal. All 14 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: POST returns 422 on missing name field (Pydantic validation working)
PUT and DELETE both return 404 for nonexistent/wrong-user exercise IDs
Soft delete (isArchived=True) correctly hides exercise from GET list
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Romanian Deadlift Pause exercise during test run; soft-deleted after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Exercises CRUD endpoints fully verified. All flows pass: GET (empty/populated), POST (create + 422 validation), PUT (update + verify), DELETE (soft-delete + verify hidden). Calendar events endpoint also accessible with no exercise limit.
